problem id: a521be72
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11100110 -> 01001101
  01111000 -> 11000011
  11010011 -> 01110111
  01010110 -> 00010100
  10110011 -> 01000111
  01111011 -> 00100010
  00000110 -> 00111100
  01111101 -> 11100001
  10001000 -> 10111011

query: 01000000
predicted answer: 11011111
